title: Amara's Sound Garden
synopsis: Baby Amara explores her garden and discovers different sounds, counting from one to five while learning about the music all around her.

pages.text: Amara goes to the garden. What sounds will she find?

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes walks into a colorful garden. Gentle wavy lines in soft pastels float around her, showing the anticipation of sound.
illustration.alt: Amara entering a garden with visible sound waves

pages.text: ONE bee buzzes. Bzzzz! The sound is yellow and round.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes points at a bee. Bright yellow circular vibrations and wavy lines surround the bee, making the buzz visible as golden spirals.
illustration.alt: Amara watching a bee with yellow sound waves

pages.text: TWO birds chirp. Tweet tweet! The sounds are blue bubbles floating up.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes looks up at two birds. Light blue dots and small circular shapes float upward, visualizing the chirping sounds as delicate blue bubbles.
illustration.alt: Amara listening to two birds with blue sound bubbles

pages.text: THREE leaves rustle. Shhhh! The sound is green whisper dots.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes touches tree leaves. Tiny green dots dance around the leaves, showing the soft rustling as gentle whisper patterns.
illustration.alt: Amara touching leaves with green whisper dots

pages.text: FOUR raindrops fall. Pitter patter! The sounds are silver lines dancing down.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes holds out her hand as raindrops fall. Thin silver lines cascade downward, showing the pitter-patter rhythm as shimmering vertical streaks.
illustration.alt: Amara in light rain with silver sound lines

pages.text: FIVE frogs croak. Ribbit ribbit! The sounds are big purple circles that bounce.

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes sits by a pond with five frogs. Large purple circles bounce and ripple outward, visualizing the deep croaking sounds as vibrant purple rings.
illustration.alt: Amara with five frogs and purple sound circles

pages.text: Amara claps her hands. All the garden sounds make a rainbow! One, two, three, four, five!

illustration.description: Amara with long box braids, rich brown skin, large sparkling dark eyes claps happily in the center of the garden. All the sound patterns - yellow spirals, blue bubbles, green dots, silver lines, and purple circles - swirl together in a beautiful rainbow of visible sound.
illustration.alt: Amara clapping with all sound colors creating a rainbow

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: What color is the bee's buzz?
questions.explanation: The bee's buzz is yellow and round, like sunshine circles!

questions.question: How many frogs does Amara hear?
questions.explanation: Amara hears five frogs croaking with big purple sound circles!

questions.question: What do the raindrops sound like?
questions.explanation: The raindrops go pitter patter and look like silver lines dancing down!
